basic_details.job_title: ICSIL Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Intelligent Communication Systems India (ICSIL) Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICSIL Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in any discipline OR B.Tech/BE/B.Arch degree. Diploma in Graphic Design/Visual Arts desirable. Proficiency in MS Power Point, MS Word, and MS Excel.
qualification.details: Post graduate in any discipline from a recognized university/institution. OR B.Tech/BE/B.Arch degree from the recognized university. In addition, Diploma in Graphic Design/Visual Arts from reputed Govt. or private institute is desirable. Proficiency in computer applications, particular MS Power Point, MS Word, and MS Excel. Minimum 0-2 years' experience in relevant field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICSIL Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICSIL Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSIL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSIL Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the ICSIL Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) position is 02 August 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post graduate degree in any discipline OR a B.Tech/BE/B.Arch degree. A Diploma in Graphic Design/Visual Arts is desirable, along with proficiency in MS Office applications.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 46,000/- per month, excluding EPF contributions.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for ICSIL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories of candidates is Rs. 590/- which is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a scrutiny of documents followed by an interaction or interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a contractual outsourced basis, meaning the positions are not permanent government jobs.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the ICSIL Project Associate (Documentation and Design Support) recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.
